meta.title: Fireside Chat: Where OPC UA Makes Sense, Standards Adoption, & More
meta.description:
Tom Burke was synonymous with OPC as the founder and leader of the OPC Foundation for three decades. Now that Tom has been away from the OPC Foundation for five years, Dale discussed where OPC UA should be used, where it doesn't make sense, what is the likely future for OPC UA, and more. Some of the answers will likely surprise you, and it's important information for your OT architecture decisions.

Subscribe to Dale’s ICS Security: Friday News & Notes email here:
https://friday.dale-peterson.com/signup
Check out S4x26. Feb 23 - 26 in Miami South Beach:
https://s4xevents.com
